description.value: Aura moderate varies; CL 8th; Slot none; Price 23,000 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION This stout ironbound staff functions as a +1/+1 quarterstaff. It allows the use of the following spells: Forced quiet (1 charge) Interrogation (1 charge) Oppressive boredom (2 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells forced quiet, interrogation, oppressive boredom; Cost 11,800 gp.
